user.title: Connect Secvest
user.description: Host, for example https://192.168.2.22:4433. With newer Secvest firmware, you may need to enter the user code in the Username / Code field. Shorter intervals react faster but create more requests to the Secvest.

data.verify_ssl: Verify SSL (turn off for self-signed certificates)

init.title: Secvest Options
init.description: For faster sensor updates, set the intervals to e.g. 10 seconds. For RSSI, optionally enter a separate restricted web user. RSSI polling stays disabled without web credentials.
